title.en: There are resources that even he can't afford.

content.en:
"There are really a lot of good things on the ship, all kinds of inheritances, all kinds of super secret treasures, all kinds of precious resources. "

Ye Tian couldn't wait to buy all the resources, but unfortunately he didn't have so many Galan Treasure Coins.

There are resources that even he can't afford.

In addition, there are many resources that help suppress extradimensional assimilation, and many peak realm gods of the supreme forces are buying this resource.

For example, a resource called Jialanbaodan, which is a super-dimensional elixir refined from various precious resources, can suppress the situation of super-dimensional assimilation.

Many peak realm gods who have fused extra-dimensional things are suffering from the assimilation of extra-dimensional things, and if they take the Garan Bao Dan, they will last for a long time.

You must know that some of the peak realm gods of the supreme forces can no longer hold on, and they urgently need this kind of Jialanbao Pill, but this super-dimensional pill "Six, Four, Seven" medicine has the best effect when taken for the first time, and if you take it more times, the effect will be greatly reduced.

But no matter how bad the effect is, for these peak realm gods who have fused with extradimensional things, it is okay to persist for a while longer, maybe they will completely master the power of superdimensionality, then completely solve the problem, and there is no need to worry about the problem of extradimensional assimilation.

As time passed, various peak realm gods traded here.

However, Ye Tian was very puzzled why he hadn't seen the demon seed.

Didn't you say that the demons were also allowed to enter here?

But soon, he learned the reason from the other peak realm gods, the demon seed was indeed allowed to come, but not here, but in another area, an area dedicated to special creatures.

Moreover, the needs of the demon seeds are also different from those of the peak realm gods, and they are prone to conflict when put together.

That's why the Garanbo ship does this.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was no longer curious.

......

Soon after, the Peak Realm Gods almost spent almost all the Garlan Treasure Coins on their bodies, and only a very few Peak Realm Gods still had a lot of Garan Treasure Coins.

But none of them left, but waited for a special moment.

After some time, a special building on the Galanbo ship opened, and a pinnacle god entered.

Ye Tian already knew what this place was, this was a small auction of the Galanbo Ship, and only two things were auctioned.

However, every peak realm god wants to bid, but most of the peak realm gods are not qualified to bid, so they can only be reduced to a foil and watch.

Ye Tian also walked in and sat down in a seat.

The other pinnacle realm gods also sat down one by one, waiting for the Garan auction to begin.

Soon, the person in charge of the Garan auction appeared on the auction table, and the powerful aura on his body far surpassed that of other peak realm gods.

Ye Tian was secretly surprised, he could sense the terrifying aura on the other party's body.

"It is definitely a peak realm god who has condensed the thirteen eternal realm spirits, and it is very likely that he has completely mastered the power of the extradimensional dimension!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Such a peak realm god was enough to sweep away all the peak realm gods present.

"Dear friends from the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory, this time we will auction three places for the ship and one place for the employees of the ship. "

This Garanbao Ship Peak Realm God said.

As the name suggests, once you win such a quota, you can stay on the Garanbo ship, and then you can disembark in one of the realms when the Garanbo ship goes to other territories.

In this way, you can completely leave your own territory and seek more opportunities and hope in a more powerful territory.

The number of employees of the Jialanbao ship is even more precious, once the auction is won, it will directly become one of the employees of the Jialanbao ship.

This is also the opportunity that every peak realm god dreams of!

"You can even become an employee of the Garanbao ship!"

After all, if you become an employee of the Garanbo Ship, then you can follow the Garanbo Ship to any territory, and there are many opportunities in the future.

Moreover, he also has many copy bodies, just send one copy body at will, and it doesn't affect anything.

But the next moment, he was completely uninterested in the staff slots of the Garanbao ship.

Because he knew from the discussions of the other pinnacle gods that once he became an employee of the Garanbol Ship, he had to set up the strictest experiments and be loyal to the forces behind the Garanbol Ship for life, without the slightest idea of betrayal, and he had to obey the arrangements of the Garambol Ship.....

Ye Tian naturally would not make such an oath, otherwise he would never be able to get rid of the Garlan Treasure Ship in the future, and even other duplicate bodies would have to be affected by the Garland Treasure Ship, and maybe his secrets would have to be exposed. []

However, the other pinnacle gods didn't care about this, they were still eager to become employees of the Garlan Treasure Ship, even if it cost a lot of money.

After all, once you become an employee of the Treasure Ship, at least you have a good chance of controlling the power of the extradimensional in the future, and there is also hope of becoming a superdimensional realm.

Not only that, but you can also go to countless territories, see more places, and be safe.

And in this area, the Peak Realm God will also fall somewhere in the Death Void at any time.

So, for them, the benefits of joining the Garanbao ship far outweigh the disadvantages.

"Next, the auction will start for the first place of the Garanbao ship, and the starting price will be 100,000 Galanbol coins!"

Said the auctioneer of the Garanbao ship.

In an instant, many peak realm gods began to bid.

One hundred thousand Gala Blue Treasure Coins is indeed a lot, but some peak realm gods have accumulated countless years, even if ten billion Dao Era has accumulated resources of one hundred Gala Blue Treasure Coins, they can save some in their usual cultivation, and they can be collected by relying on long years.

Therefore, there is definitely a peak realm god with 100,000 Gala Blue Treasure Coins.

And some peak demon seeds also have a wealth of more than 1.2 coins of 100,000 galamarines, and they will also bid for this place.

Ye Tian looked at those peak realm gods and peak demon seeds competing for the place of the Jialanbao Ship, and he didn't mean to participate at all.

"110,000 Galanbao Coins!"

"120,000 Galanbao coins!"

"130,000 Galanbao Coins!"

Over time, the price of the Ship Spot has skyrocketed to over 200,000 Galanbao Coins.

At this moment, Ye Tian knew that there were still a lot of peak realm gods with more wealth than himself, and they were all hidden deeply, and they would only be revealed at the critical moment.

In the end, one of the peak realm gods of the Two Realms Gate took out 250,000 Gala Treasure Coins to bid for this place.

After that, the remaining two places were also auctioned one by one.
